content.body: If no objections I'll comment something along those lines soon
my reading is "contributions" means code changes, proposal explainers, specs, etc, and it doesn't appear that the policy is only meant to apply to "outsiders"
not that I object to accepting this PR, but I also wouldn't object to closing it without consideration based on our policy
i agree the policy, whatever it is, applies universally
and i also agree that "contributions" in no context means "just code", it's anything
(i have not formed an opinion about the specific PR, to be clear)
